steps.title: Use slope-intercept form
steps.content:
A line with slope $m$ and $y$-intercept $b$ can be written as
$$
y=mx+b
$$

steps.title: Substitute the slope and intercept
steps.content: The slope is $7$. The point $(0,9)$ is on the $y$-axis, so the $y$-intercept is $9$. Therefore, $$ y=7x+9 $$ The answer is A.
